---
title: "Welcome"
---

# Welcome

I'm a clinician-scientist at the intersection of cancer, genetics, and health outcomes, and I work at a biotech/data/AI company. My work centers on designing and implementing research studies that combine real-world data—EHR, claims, genetic test results, curated clinician notes—to understand how novel drugs are used in cancer care and to explore patient outcomes, resource use, and cost-effectiveness.

This site is a home base for my projects, a place to practice coding outside work, and a way to connect with other clinicians, scientists, and anyone interested in this work. You'll find both professional work and hobby or learning projects here—things I'm proud of or quality-of-life improvements I want to share.


## Papers & writing

Most of my published work is in pharmacogenomics, health economics, and cancer real-world evidence. Full list and short notes over in [publications](/bibliography/published_works.qmd). 



## Projects

My outside-of-work coding projects support my hobbies and family, and I always try to build in a new skill or two. You can find more about my projects in the [projects](/projects) section.
